name: Ferry Building Marketplace
description: Historic transit terminal turned gourmet food hall, with artisan vendors and a waterfront farmers' market.

name: Painted Ladies
description: The iconic row of pastel Victorian houses at Alamo Square, framed by the downtown skyline.

name: Coit Tower
description: Art-deco tower on Telegraph Hill with 360° city views and 1930s WPA murals inside.
address: 1 Telegraph Hill Blvd, San Francisco, CA

name: Japanese Tea Garden
description: The oldest public Japanese garden in the U.S., with koi ponds, a pagoda, and a serene tea house.
address: 75 Hagiwara Tea Garden Dr, San Francisco, CA

name: Pier 39 Sea Lions
description: Lively waterfront pier famous for its resident sea lions, street performers, and bay views.
